extract: Icepeak Arena (Japanese: 氷山の戦場 Iceberg Battlefield) is an area located in the western region of the Alabaster Icelands of Hisui. It is located south of Snowfall Hot Spring and north of Arena's Approach. It is the place where the noble Avalugg, Lord of the Tundra (Japanese: 雪原キング King of the Snowfield), resides. Avalugg is fought here as part of Mission 12: "The Slumbering Lord of the Tundra" to calm him of his frenzy. Warden Gaeric of the Pearl Clan tends to Avalugg here. During the cutscene before Lord Avalugg's initial battle, it is revealed that his body actually constitutes part of the surface of the arena.
